facts.fact: Memory ledgers now have JSON sidecars for programmatic access
koadOS is now a standalone functional OS with automated boot and saveup protocols.
Ian Deans (User) is the operator-engineer for Skylinks; focus on operational continuity.
Primary Work & Dev Account: ian@skylinksgolf.com (GitHub, GCP, Airtable)
All Skylinks projects are located in ~/data/skylinks/.
~/data/ is the general root for all development work.
GitHub MCP is now connected and integrated into the koadOS Gemini stack.
GitHub Authentication Rules: Default to GITHUB_PERSONAL_PAT; use GITHUB_SKYLINKS_PAT in ~/data/skylinks/ or /mnt/c/data/skylinks/.
